<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="vNfgYP5Nki9_LkrnPKNR"> <mxGraphModel dx="5155" dy="-9110" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="Docker + CNI Plugin" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;container=0;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1780" y="58360" width="1280" height="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="docker run \
--network none nginx" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;align=left;spacingLeft=40;shadow=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1810.89" y="58434.75" width="276.82" height="69" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Docker Daemon" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2169" y="58436" width="188.5" height="68.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Container with
No Network" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;fillColor=#cce5ff;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2434.29" y="58434.75" width="255" height="69.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Get PID from Docker" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" <mxGeometry x="2471.29" y="58600" width="181" height="69.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="Create Veth Pair" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2782" y="58489.5" width="210" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="Attach to cni0 Bridge" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2782" y="58568.5" width="210" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="Allocate IP from IPAM"
